background: A questionnaire measures an index of risk-taking behavior in respondents. Scores are standardized so that 100 represents the population average. The questionnaire is applied to a sample of teenage boy and girls.

task.query: Explore group differences with side-by-side boxplots.
task.answer: The girls have lower scores on average and less variability. There is one outlier in the girls.
task.method: 离散型-连续型变量关系

meta info.caption: Risk-taking behavior in boys and girls.
